---
description: 'Accessibility (a11y) testing standards for PRAGMA E2E — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance'
applyTo: 'tests/a11y/**/*.spec.ts'
---

## Accessibility Testing Guidelines

### Standard: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
All PRAGMA UI must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. A11y tests use `@axe-core/playwright` to automate
accessibility audits alongside manual keyboard navigation checks.

### Setup
```typescript
import AxeBuilder from '@axe-core/playwright';
import { test, expect } from '../../src/fixtures/base.fixture';

test('PRAGMA page has no a11y violations @a11y', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto('/dashboard');
  const results = await new AxeBuilder({ page })
    .withTags(['wcag2a', 'wcag2aa', 'wcag21aa'])
    .analyze();
  expect(results.violations).toEqual([]);
});
```

### Required Checks Per Page
- [ ] axe-core scan with `wcag2a`, `wcag2aa`, `wcag21aa` tags
- [ ] Keyboard navigation (Tab/Shift-Tab through all interactive elements)
- [ ] Heading hierarchy (single `h1`, logical `h2`/`h3` structure)
- [ ] Form labels programmatically associated (`aria-labelledby` or `<label for>`)
- [ ] Error messages linked to inputs via `aria-describedby`
- [ ] Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
- [ ] Images have `alt` text (decorative images use `alt=""`)
- [ ] Color contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 (text) and ≥ 3:1 (UI components)

### Playwright a11y Assertions
```typescript
// Verify ARIA snapshot structure
await expect(page.getByRole('main')).toMatchAriaSnapshot(`
  - main:
    - heading "Strategy Dashboard" [level=1]
    - region "Key Results":
      - list:
        - listitem: ...
`);

// Verify keyboard reachability
await page.keyboard.press('Tab');
const focused = page.locator(':focus');
await expect(focused).toBeVisible();
```

### Key PRAGMA Areas to Test
- Login form: label-input association, error state aria attributes
- Strategy Dashboard: heading hierarchy, landmark regions
- Modal dialogs: focus trap, Escape closes modal, aria-modal
- Navigation sidebar: nav landmark, aria-current on active item
- Tables/Grids (if present): column headers, keyboard grid navigation
